title: The Canary Caper
desc: Pets vanish all over town — then the same houses get robbed. 🐦

q.en: How many pets disappeared in Green Lawn on the same day?
q.zh: 在同一天里，绿草坪镇一共丢了几只宠物？

explain.en: Officer Fallon said four pets were missing: Mrs. Davis's canary Mozart, Ruth Rose's cat Tiger, Dr. Pardue's rabbit Violet, and Mrs. Gwynn's parrot Archie.
explain.zh: 法伦警官说有四只宠物失踪：戴维斯太太的金丝雀莫扎特、露丝的猫老虎、帕杜医生的兔子维奥莱特、格温太太的鹦鹉阿奇。

q.en: Who brought Mrs. Davis's canary Mozart back home?
q.zh: 是谁把戴维斯太太的金丝雀莫扎特送回来的？

explain.en: A thin young man named Fred Little returned Mozart in a small box with holes poked in the sides and refused any reward.
explain.zh: 一个叫弗雷德·利特尔的瘦年轻人把莫扎特装在有孔的盒子里送了回来，还谢绝了任何酬谢。

q.en: What trick did the thieves use to get inside people's houses?
q.zh: 小偷用了什么诡计进到别人家里？

options.en: They returned the stolen pets to get a peek inside the house, then came back to rob it
options.zh: 他们先还回宠物混进屋里踩点，再回来偷东西

options.en: They sent a ransom note first
They called the police to open the door

explain.en: The crooks stole a pet, returned it so the owners would invite them in (and show them around), then later burglarized the same house.
explain.zh: 坏蛋先偷宠物，再送回来，让主人请他们进屋参观，摸清情况后回头再来抢劫同一户人家。

q.en: What special tool did Fred Little use to reach Mrs. Davis's second-floor window?
q.zh: 弗雷德·利特尔用了什么特别工具爬上戴维斯太太家二楼的窗户？

explain.en: He pulled a pair of long stilts from his gym bag and stilt-walked up to the small second-floor window.
explain.zh: 他从运动包里拿出一副长高跷，踩着高跷走到二楼的小窗户前。

q.en: What was Fred Little's other job that helped him pull off the crimes?
q.zh: 弗雷德·利特尔的另一份工作是什么，让他能顺利作案？

options.en: A clown in the traveling circus

explain.en: He was a clown with the Tinker Town Traveling Circus — the Superman clown on stilts — which is why Josh recognized him.
explain.zh: 他是丁克镇流动马戏团的小丑——踩高跷的超人小丑，所以乔什后来认出了他。

q.en: Why couldn't Officer Fallon arrest Fred Little right after he returned the canary?
q.zh: 为什么弗雷德送回金丝雀后，法伦警官不能马上逮捕他？

options.en: There was no evidence he had committed a crime yet
options.zh: 当时还没有他犯罪的证据

options.en: Mrs. Davis refused to press charges

explain.en: Returning a lost canary and being inside the house was the same pattern as the other burglaries, but without proof of a planned crime, he couldn't be arrested.
explain.zh: 送回走失的金丝雀并进入屋内，虽然和另外两起盗窃模式一样，但没有犯罪证据，就不能抓人。

q.en: What surprise did Ruth Rose find at the very end of the story?
q.zh: 故事最后，露丝·罗丝发现了什么惊喜？

options.en: Tiger came home with three kittens
options.zh: 老虎带着三只小猫回家了

options.en: Tiger was stolen by Fred Little
Tiger was performing at the circus

explain.en: Tiger returned on her own and had hidden three newborn kittens under Ruth Rose's bed, making her a 'grandmother.'
explain.zh: 老虎自己回来了，还在露丝的床下藏了三只刚出生的小猫，让露丝成了“外婆”。

q.en: How did the kids recognize Fred Little during the nighttime stakeout?
q.zh: 夜里守候时，孩子们是怎么认出弗雷德·利特尔的？

options.en: By his yellow suspenders from the circus clown
options.zh: 凭他在马戏团小丑那身黄吊带

explain.en: Josh noticed Fred's yellow suspenders — the same ones worn by the Superman clown he'd seen snapping suspenders at the circus.
explain.zh: 乔什注意到弗雷德的黄吊带——和他在马戏团看到的、弹着吊带的超人小丑身上那根一模一样。

q.en: Where did Mrs. Davis's long sword come from?
q.zh: 戴维斯太太那把长剑是从哪里来的？

options.en: Her husband brought it back from one of their trips
options.zh: 她丈夫旅行时带回来的

options.en: She bought it at the circus
Officer Fallon gave it to her

explain.en: Mrs. Davis said her late husband had brought the sword back from one of their trips, and it had been under her bed for years.
explain.zh: 戴维斯太太说，这把剑是她已故的丈夫某次旅行带回来的，在床底下放了多年。

q.en: What is the name of Ruth Rose's orange cat?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝那只橘色猫叫什么名字？

explain.en: Ruth Rose's plump orange cat is named Tiger; Loretta is Dink's guinea pig, Mozart is the canary, and Nate is Ruth Rose's little brother.
explain.zh: 露丝那只胖橘猫叫老虎；洛蕾塔是丁克的豚鼠，莫扎特是金丝雀，内特是露丝的小弟弟。
